## Validation

- [ ] Deterministic checks pass locally
- [ ] Internal links resolve
- [ ] Success and failure behavior are both addressed
- [ ] Raw evidence or trace location is identified when applicable
- [ ] No secret, credential, private dataset, or generated build artifact is included
